# Contract Reference

This directory is generated from the Go-owned contract module in `internal/contracts`. Use `scripts/sync-contract-artifacts` to refresh these docs and the checked-in JSON Schemas under `schema/`.

- Schema index: [`schema/index.json`](../../../schema/index.json)
- Source of truth: `internal/contracts`

## Local Artifacts

- [CI evidence record artifact](artifacts/evidence-ci-record.md): Command-owned CI evidence artifact. Schema: [evidence-ci-record.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/evidence-ci-record.schema.json)
- [Current plan pointer file](artifacts/current-plan.md): Worktree-level pointer artifact at `.local/harness/current-plan.json`. Schema: [current-plan.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/current-plan.schema.json)
- [Plan-local state file](artifacts/local-state.md): Plan-local runtime state artifact at `.local/harness/plans/<plan-stem>/state.json`. Schema: [local-state.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/local-state.schema.json)
- [Publish evidence record artifact](artifacts/evidence-publish-record.md): Command-owned publish evidence artifact. Schema: [evidence-publish-record.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/evidence-publish-record.schema.json)
- [Review aggregate artifact](artifacts/review-aggregate.md): Command-owned review aggregate artifact. Schema: [review-aggregate.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/review-aggregate.schema.json)
- [Review ledger artifact](artifacts/review-ledger.md): Command-owned review ledger artifact for one review round. Schema: [review-ledger.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/review-ledger.schema.json)
- [Review manifest artifact](artifacts/review-manifest.md): Command-owned review manifest artifact for one review round. Schema: [review-manifest.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/review-manifest.schema.json)
- [Review submission artifact](artifacts/review-submission.md): Command-owned reviewer submission artifact. Schema: [review-submission.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/review-submission.schema.json)
- [Sync evidence record artifact](artifacts/evidence-sync-record.md): Command-owned sync evidence artifact. Schema: [evidence-sync-record.schema.json](../../../schema/artifacts/evidence-sync-record.schema.json)

- [Evidence submit command result](command-results/evidence-submit-result.md): JSON output for `harness evidence submit`. Schema: [evidence.submit.result.schema.json](../../../schema/commands/evidence.submit.result.schema.json)

Schema: [lifecycle.result.schema.json](../../../schema/commands/lifecycle.result.schema.json)
- [Review aggregate command result](command-results/review-aggregate-result.md): JSON output for `harness review aggregate`. Schema: [review.aggregate.result.schema.json](../../../schema/commands/review.aggregate.result.schema.json)

## Shared Shapes

- [Error detail](shared/error-detail.md): Reusable path-plus-message error shape embedded in multiple command results. Schema: [error-detail.schema.json](../../../schema/shared/error-detail.schema.json)
